hero.lede: Custom woven and roller-printed fabric, made in one mill since 1980 — for the people who turn cloth into collections.

about.p1: For four decades, Firma Textile has drawn, woven, and roller-printed fabric in a single mill — patterns developed in-house, colour matched by eye, finished by hand.
about.p2: We supply apparel manufacturers and fashion houses with custom designs, repeatable colourways, and runs scaled to your order — one point of contact, from first swatch to finished bolt.

collections.heading: Curated. Crafted. Timeless.
collections.sub: A selection from our weaving and printing — swatches available on request.
collections.micro: Full collection & colourways sent on request

contact.heading: Request the collection.
contact.intro: Tell us what you're making — we'll send samples or set up a call. Your Firma agent can also arrange this directly.
contact.address:
Showroom by appointment
123 Heritage Lane, New York, NY 10001
contact.agent: Working with a Firma agent? Mention their name and we'll route your samples through them.
